search.idle: Type a query to search modules, glossary entries, and tags.
search.error: Search is temporarily unavailable. The index could not be loaded.

searchEntry.title: Search
searchEntry.description: Search Model Atlas by title, alias, or tag. Use the search control to jump to modules, concepts, and glossary entries.
searchEntry.canonicalNote: Canonical search entry URL: /search. Query handoffs may append ?q=<term>; tag handoffs may append ?tag=<slug> or ?classification=<id-or-slug> (for example /search?classification=activation).
searchEntry.classificationScopeDescription: Showing results scoped to the {classification} classification.

home.title: you-agent-factory
home.subtitle: Docs for the agent factory CLI
home.intro: you-agent-factory is the CLI documentation for installing the factory, running named goals, and operating harnesses, loops, reviews, planners, crons, and event streams.
home.whyBody: Run hundreds of agents at once so long-running factory work stays moving without babysitting each session by hand.
home.featuresIntro: The factory supports common agent harnesses and workflow formats:
home.featureHarnesses: Harness support for running agents under a shared factory runtime
home.featureLoop: loop — keep work iterating until the goal is done
home.featureReview: review — send completed work through a review pass
home.featurePlanner: planner — plan and sequence multi-step factory work
home.featureEventStreams: event streams — observe factory progress as events
home.guidesLinkDescription: Start with how-to guides for installing and running the agent factory CLI.
home.docsLinkDescription: Open the docs browse hub to explore CLI documentation collections.
home.glossaryLinkDescription: Scan short definitions for factory and CLI terms.
home.blogLinkDescription: Read updates and deeper write-ups about the agent factory.

browseIndex.title: Browse
browseIndex.description: Start from the kind of collection you need: guides, concepts, techniques, or documentation. This page points you to the right part of the reference and gives a few strong starting pages.
browseIndex.quickRoutesDescription: Use these entry points when you know how you want to explore, but not the exact page yet.
browseIndex.searchRouteDescription: Jump straight to a title, alias, or tag when you already have a term in mind.
browseIndex.glossaryRouteDescription: Scan short definitions when you need to decode unfamiliar language fast.
browseIndex.architectureRouteDescription: Follow model-family structure, positional schemes, and other system-shape ideas.
browseIndex.tagsRouteDescription: Browse curated topic labels that cut across models, modules, concepts, and glossary pages.
browseIndex.conceptsSectionDescription: Concept pages explain broader ideas that span many models or modules, such as transformer structure, quantization, or long-context tradeoffs.
browseIndex.guidesSectionDescription: Guide pages walk through practical CLI workflows and how to apply the reference in day-to-day work.
browseIndex.techniquesSectionDescription: Technique pages explain named methods and practices you can apply across CLI workflows and documentation tasks.
browseIndex.documentationSectionDescription: Documentation pages cover reference material for the CLI surface, including contracts, conventions, and supporting detail.
browseIndex.glossarySectionDescription: Glossary pages define the vocabulary around model architecture, training, inference, and evaluation so the rest of the atlas reads more naturally.

conceptsIndex.title: Concepts
conceptsIndex.description: Published concept pages that explain broader ideas spanning many models and modules, such as architecture patterns, quantization, and long-context tradeoffs.
conceptsIndex.emptyDescription: Published concept pages will appear here once they are added. Return home or open Browse to explore other collections in the meantime.

guidesIndex.emptyDescription: Published guide pages will appear here once they are added. Return home or open Browse to explore other collections in the meantime.

techniquesIndex.title: Techniques

techniquesIndex.emptyDescription: Published technique pages will appear here once they are added. Return home or open Browse to explore other collections in the meantime.

documentationIndex.title: Documentation
documentationIndex.description: Published documentation pages covering reference material for the CLI surface, including contracts, conventions, and supporting detail.
documentationIndex.emptyDescription: Published documentation pages will appear here once they are added. Return home or open Browse to explore other collections in the meantime.

glossaryIndex.title: Glossary
glossaryIndex.description: Defined machine-learning terms with short summaries. Each entry links to a canonical glossary page when published.
glossaryIndex.emptyDescription: Published glossary pages will appear here once they are added to the reference. Return home or open search to explore modules and tags in the meantime.

architectureIndex.title: Architecture
architectureIndex.description: Architecture-related concepts, model families, and component patterns. Each entry links to a canonical docs page when published.
architectureIndex.emptyDescription: Published architecture concept pages and pages under the architecture content grouping will appear here. Return home or open search to explore modules and tags in the meantime.

blogIndex.title: Blog
blogIndex.description: Narrative posts that connect releases and serving concepts back to canonical reference pages.
blogIndex.emptyDescription: Published narrative posts will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open search to explore models, modules, and concepts in the meantime.

tagsIndex.title: Tags
tagsIndex.description: Controlled tags for browsing topics across modules, concepts, models, and glossary pages. Each tag links to a landing page listing every published resource with that tag.

tagLanding.emptyTitle: No published resources for this tag yet
tagLanding.emptyDescription: When docs pages or blog posts are tagged with this label, they will appear here grouped by kind. Return home, browse all tags, or open search to explore related topics.
